case_title: ROGELIO BLANCAS VS. MELISSA SUE DAISY LEON SORIANO

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO MAR-27-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF FEB-15-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 - SERVED FEB-05-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SORIANO, MELISSA SUE DAISY LEON

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BLANCAS, ROGELIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SORIANO, MELISSA SUE DAISY LEON $1,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,370.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,300.00 FILED BY BLANCAS, ROGELIO AS TO DEFENDANT SORIANO, MELISSA SUE DAISY LEON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-15-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION RE: RESET OF TRIAL DATE FOR NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLANCAS, ROGELIO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-27-2019 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF MAR. 27, 2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, PARTIES WERE PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT TAKES THIS MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
